precondition: Wait externally for g2-array-56106974-r2-resume.done before the first Slurm observation, preventing a concurrent resume of this active turn.
wake_policy: After r2 completion, monitor only the 11 nonfailed original tasks; exactly one terminal COMPLETE, new task ERROR, or sustained observer failure may resume. Task 4 remains separately blocked and is not treated as successful.
worker_uuid_policy: All existing worker UUIDs preserved; no replacement.
reset_credit_policy: The remaining personal Codex Full reset is protected and was not consumed.
